coNursing_note_free_text: Nachtdienst: Mild dyspnea on exertion, Mobilization possible only with two staff members, Pain score 5/10 in surgical area. Interventions: Family discussion conducted, Vital signs checked, Physician informed about condition. Evaluation: Therapy adjustment ordered by physician.

Frühdienst: Called staff multiple times during the night, Wound reddened, dressing changed, Patient awake and oriented. Interventions: Family discussion conducted, Blood glucose monitored, Fluid balance documented, PRN medication given after consultation. Evaluation: Therapy adjustment ordered by physician.

Spätdienst: Wound reddened, dressing changed, Mobilized with assistance, Called staff multiple times during the night, No bowel movement for 2 days. Interventions: PRN medication given after consultation, Blood glucose monitored. Evaluation: Patient cooperative.
